overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player walks along a deserted promenade past neon-lit skyscrapers, the 'Los Osos' building, and a large stadium, then descends a ramp toward the lower city. Empty streets and atmospheric lighting create a moody, solitary atmosphere typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with the ocean on the right and illuminated skyscrapers on the left

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with vertical lines and illuminated windows
row of palm trees lining the promenade
metal railing separating the walkway from the water below
modern street lamp with bright white light
large illuminated advertisement showing a woman in a dress
full moon visible in the night sky
building with green neon signage near the top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a deserted waterfront promenade at night. The camera walks forward past palm trees and modern street lamps, with a towering glass skyscraper on the left and the ocean visible beyond the railing on the right. Large illuminated billboards and neon signs adorn the buildings, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with stadium and neon signage

events.description: camera turns left to face the Los Osos building and stadium structure

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward the Los Osos building, passing rows of palm trees

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign spelling 'LOS OSOS' on a building facade
massive circular stadium building with curved roof
large curved video screen wrapping around the stadium exterior
tall thin tower with red lights

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the waterfront, revealing the prominent 'LOS OSOS' neon sign and a massive stadium structure. The path continues along the plaza with palm trees now on the left and the illuminated stadium dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway beside stadium with city views

events.description: begins descending a curved ramp toward the lower city level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway beside the stadium and starting to descend a curved ramp

entered.detail: building with orange circular logo and 'MARKETNESS' signage
amusement park roller coaster structure visible in the distance
curved concrete ramp leading downward to street level

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the massive stadium structure, the camera passes the Marketness building on the left with the communication tower rising in the background. The path begins to curve downward as the descent starts, revealing a distant roller coaster and the lower city streets ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp leading to lower city streets

agents.ego_description: continuing down the curved ramp toward street level with the stadium structure now above and behind

entered.detail: multi-lane road visible at the bottom of the ramp
intersection with traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the descent down the curved ramp toward the lower city. The stadium is now behind and above, while the Marketness building and communication tower recede into the distance on the left. The camera approaches street level where neon signs and the distant roller coaster are visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a high-altitude waterfront promenade down into the neon-lit depths of a cyberpunk lower city. It begins by walking along a deserted promenade past palm trees and glass skyscrapers, with the dark ocean visible beyond the railing to the right. As the camera turns left away from the water, the view shifts to reveal the glowing Los Osos sign and a massive, illuminated stadium that begins to dominate the right side of the frame. The path then curves past the Marketness building and a towering communication tower, transitioning from the open plaza toward a descending ramp. Finally, the camera glides down the curved slope, leaving the stadium behind as the lower city streets and a distant roller coaster emerge against the night sky.
